data.description:
Make `idea â†’ closed` a reject/drop transition that bypasses the
completion/attestation close gates, keyed on the from-status being `idea`.

## Why

Closing a ticket that is in `idea` means "reject/drop this undesigned idea," not
"this work is complete." Running the completion/attestation gates on it is
nonsensical â€” there is nothing built to verify or attest â€” and would block the
reject. Only the from-status `idea` is exempted; every other close path is
unchanged.

## What

- In `_completion_precheck`, return early (skip the gate) when the ticket's
  from-status is `idea`. This one return covers the completion verifier, the
  file-impactâ†’referencing-commit precheck, and the reason-guard copy inside the
  precheck.
- In `transition_core`, skip the bug-close-reason guard and the story/epic
  signature gate when the from-status is `idea`.
- Keep the structural open-children guard active for `idea â†’ closed` (integrity,
  not completion): a parent in `idea` with non-closed children is still refused.

## Scope

- `src/rebar/_commands/transition_close.py` â€” `_completion_precheck` from-status
  exemption; the open-children guard is left in place.
- `src/rebar/_commands/txn.py` â€” `transition_core` skips the bug-reason guard and
  signature gate when from-status is `idea`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Closing a ticket from `idea` does not invoke the completion verifier
      (test-verified, e.g. via a spy/no-LLM assertion).
- [ ] Closing a ticket from `idea` does not run the file-impactâ†’referencing-commit
      precheck.
- [ ] Closing an `idea` bug does not require a `Fixed:`/`Escalated:` close reason.
- [ ] Closing an `idea` story does not require a certified signature under the
      signature gate.
- [ ] Closing an `idea` epic does not require a certified signature under the
      signature gate.
- [ ] Closing an `idea` parent that has a non-closed child is still refused by the
      structural open-children guard (test-verified).
- [ ] A normal (non-`idea`) close path still runs the completion verifier
      unchanged (regression test-verified).
- [ ] `make lint` passes for the changed files.
data.title: Bypass completion/attestation close gates for idea-to-closed
